title: Prospect-data eval in technical validation
hypothesis: Technology deals in technical_validation or proposal with active competitive_intel signals, where the rep runs a head-to-head eval on the prospect's own data instead of citing public benchmarks, show ~15% higher technical_validation to proposal conversion.
description: Reps are given a lightweight eval harness and a one-page framing script. Soft mode per §1.5 — the rep chooses whether to run it; usage is attributed at transcript processing time.

applicability.description: Technology deals in technical_validation or proposal with active competitive_intel signals, open for 2+ days.

title: Proactive zero-retention DPA + SOC 2 packet before security review
hypothesis: Technology deals with active deal_blocker signals where the zero-retention DPA and SOC 2 Type II report are delivered before the formal security review begins show fewer security-stage stalls and shorter time-in-stage.
description: When a deal_blocker signal touches security or data governance, the rep sends the pre-assembled governance packet to the prospect's security contact within 24 hours. Attribution at email/activity event time per §1.4 (out-of-conversation).

applicability.description: Technology deals in technical_validation or proposal with active deal_blocker signals.

title: Solutions Architect on the first call for AI-native prospects
hypothesis: AI-native technology prospects where a Solutions Architect joins the first discovery call (vs. AE-only) reach technical_validation faster and with cleaner decision-criteria capture.
description: AE-proposed per §1.6; approved by Marcus. Rubric-scored implicit approach — the SA presence is attributed from the participant list rather than a single in-conversation tactic.

applicability.description: Technology deals in discovery or technical_validation, not yet closed.
